history.content: Hey! How can I help you today?
what can you tell me about your sub agent system

SmallClaw lets you spawn persistent subagents for focused, repeatable tasks (e.g., research, editing) by defining their tools, goals, and constraints; you call `spawn_subagent` with the spec and then delegate work to them as needed. Subagents can be reused later, stay in `.smallclaw/subagents/`, and you should configure them with clear instructions, tool access, and success criteria.

Okay great so lets talk and plan this out properly - I gave you an X account - its @Small_Claw_ and its always logged in on my computer. I want you to essentially create a Sub agent strictly to be in control of the X account, I want this posting daily. So we have to put it on a schedule and make sure you spawn the sub agent everytime you run the scheduled task. 

DOnt do anything yet just plan out how youre gonna do this properly

Plan: (1) review existing workflows via search_workflow_templates to avoid duplicates, (2) design a scheduled workflow that triggers daily posting through the logged-in @Small_Claw_ X account, (3) spawn an X-focused subagent with tight tool access/instructions and ensure each run instantiates it, (4) wire the workflow to call the subagent when the schedule fires, and (5) confirm/test before enabling. Let me know if you want me to proceed.

Great lets go ahead and get that setup - and I want you to go ahead and make a new post as an initial run as well. So lets schedule it for7:05PM EST daily posting so it can happen automatically in a few minutes
Agent Builder is unreachable at http://localhost:3005, so I can’t create or deploy the scheduled workflow yet—could you please ensure Agent Builder is running so I can continue?
